actions.expression:
SELECT 
    cghtsheet.hthm,
    cghtsheet.wxrl,
    cghtsheet.cgsl,
    COALESCE(cy.chzl, 0) AS ycsl,
    (cghtsheet.cgsl - COALESCE(cy.chzl, 0)) AS syslz
FROM cghtsheet 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        wyzd,
        SUM(chsl) AS chzl
    FROM chyjhsheet 
    WHERE wyzd IS NOT NULL 
        AND wyzd <> ''
    GROUP BY wyzd
) AS cy ON cghtsheet.wyzd = cy.wyzd
WHERE cghtsheet.khmc = [出运计划.客户名称]
    AND cghtsheet.xjht = '新'
    AND cghtsheet.cgsl > 0
    AND (cghtsheet.cgsl - COALESCE(cy.chzl, 0)) > 0

WITH wyzd_aggregate AS (
    SELECT wyzd,
           SUM(chsl) AS xdsl3
    FROM chyjhsheet
    WHERE chsl IS NOT NULL
      AND wyzd IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY wyzd
)
SELECT cghtsheet.sid,
       cght.wxht,
       cght.jhrq,
       cght.jsfs,
       cght.chyq,
       cght.ysfs,
       cght.pzbz,
       cght.wyzren,
       cght.ysbz,
       cght.cpyq,
       cght.skfm,
       cght.bank,
       cght.zh,
       cght.szdq,
       cght.rkdd,
       wx.sfsq,
       wx.mdck,
       cghtsheet.pxbj,
       cghtsheet.bz3,
       wx.mjdj1,
       cght.cgry,
       cght.gdry,
       cght.yhry,
       cghtsheet.cpbh,
       cghtsheet.lshh,
       cghtsheet.cpgg,
       cghtsheet.khhh,
       cghtsheet.zhwbgpm,
       cghtsheet.gchh,
       cghtsheet.zwpm,
       cghtsheet.ywpm,
       cghtsheet.hgbm,
       cghtsheet.cgjg,
       cghtsheet.sl,
       cghtsheet.cgxs,
       cghtsheet.wxrl,
       cghtsheet.jldw,
       cghtsheet.zzsl,
       cghtsheet.bzdw,
       cghtsheet.mz,
       cghtsheet.zmz,
       cghtsheet.jz,
       cghtsheet.zjz,
       cghtsheet.bzcd,
       cghtsheet.bzkd,
       cghtsheet.bzgd,
       cghtsheet.tj,
       cghtsheet.ztj,
       cghtsheet.chhj,
       cghtsheet.gcpp,
       cghtsheet.ksbh,
       cghtsheet.hbdm,
       cghtsheet.chsl,
       cghtsheet.tjtj,
       wx.wxdj,
       cght.ywry,
       cght.sccj,
       cghtsheet.cgsl,
       cghtsheet.sysl,
       cghtsheet.sccj1,
       cghtsheet.bjhh,
       cghtsheet.sccj1id,
       cghtsheet.gcdh,
       cghtsheet.nhrl,
       cghtsheet.nhwx,
       cghtsheet.qtcz,
       cghtsheet.zkfy,
       cghtsheet.jiel,
       cghtsheet.blbl,
       wx.twxdj,
       cghtsheet.wcsl,
       cght.hthm,
       cghtsheet.jcsj,
       cghtsheet.djpm,
       cghtsheet.djpmy,
       cghtsheet.djpmw,
       cghtsheet.krCODE,
       cghtsheet.kpgc,
       cghtsheet.zzjgdm,
       cghtsheet.kplxr,
       cghtsheet.kpdh,
       cghtsheet.krtm,
       cghtsheet.yjcq,
       cghtsheet.chrq,
       cghtsheet.bgjldw,
       cghtsheet.ljrk,
       cghtsheet.wxwyzd,
       cghtsheet.wyzd,
       cghtsheet.qtsm1,
       cghtsheet.sfsj,
       cghtsheet.bjhh1,
       cghtsheet.zsbh,
       cghtsheet.hhbz,
       cghtsheet.ytxx,
       cghtsheet.ytsb,
       cghtsheet.fktt,
       wx.pkRMB,
       wx.krddh,
       wx.yjbl,
       wx.sl6,
       wx.aybl,
       wx.asl6,
			 IFNULL(wya.xdsl3, 0) AS xdsl3,
       (cghtsheet.cgsl - IFNULL(wya.xdsl3, 0)) AS sysl3,
       cghtsheet.hyd,
       cghtsheet.ksdhh,
       cghtsheet.ltuthg
FROM cght
INNER JOIN cghtsheet ON cght.rid = cghtsheet.pid
LEFT JOIN wyzd_aggregate wya ON cghtsheet.wyzd = wya.wyzd
LEFT JOIN wxhtsheet wx ON cghtsheet.wxwyzd = wx.wxwyzd
WHERE cght.xjht = "新" 
  AND cght.sfhz = "通过" 
  AND cght.hthm like concat("%",[出运计划.所有合同],"%") 
  AND (cghtsheet.sccj1 <> "" OR cghtsheet.csmc <> "")
ORDER BY cght.hthm ASC 
LIMIT 20000

       cghtsheet.bzgd,
       cghtsheet.tj,
       cghtsheet.ztj,
       cghtsheet.chhj,
       cghtsheet.chsl,
       cghtsheet.tjtj,
       cghtsheet.wxdj,
       cght.hthm,
       cght.ywry,
       cght.sccj,
       cghtsheet.cgsl,
       cghtsheet.sysl,
       cghtsheet.sccj1,
       cghtsheet.bjhh,
       cghtsheet.sccj1id,
       cghtsheet.gcdh,
       cghtsheet.nhrl,
       cghtsheet.nhwx,
       cghtsheet.qtcz,
       cghtsheet.zkfy,
       cghtsheet.jiel,
       cghtsheet.blbl,
       cghtsheet.twxdj,
       cghtsheet.wcsl,
       cght.hthm,
       cghtsheet.jcsj,
       cghtsheet.djpm,
       cghtsheet.djpmy,
       cghtsheet.djpmw,
       cghtsheet.krCODE,
       cghtsheet.kpgc,
       cghtsheet.zzjgdm,
       cghtsheet.kplxr,
       cghtsheet.kpdh,
       cghtsheet.krtm,
       cghtsheet.chrq,
       cghtsheet.bgjldw,
       cghtsheet.ljrk,
       cghtsheet.wxwyzd,
       cghtsheet.qtsm1,
       cghtsheet.sfsj,
       cghtsheet.bjhh1,
       cghtsheet.zsbh,
       cghtsheet.wyzd,
       cghtsheet.hhbz,
       cghtsheet.pkrmb,
       cghtsheet.ksdhh
FROM cght,cghtsheet 
WHERE (cght.rid=cghtsheet.pid) 
  AND (cght.khmc=[出运计划.客户名称]) 
  AND (cght.xjht="新") 
  AND ((cght.cgsh="1") 
  OR (cght.sfhz="通过")) 
  AND (cghtsheet.cgjg<>0) 
  AND (cghtsheet.yjcq>=[出运计划.起始船期]) 
  AND (cghtsheet.yjcq<=[出运计划.结束船期]) 
ORDER BY cghtsheet.sid ASC

       cghtsheet.ksdhh
FROM cght,cghtsheet

JOIN (
SELECT sum(chyjhsheet.chsl) as xdsl3,chyjhsheet.wyzd

GROUP BY chyjhsheet.wyzd) AS p 
  ON cghtsheet.wyzd=p.wyzd

       wxhtsheet.tsl,
       wxhtsheet.tjtj,
       wxhtsheet.zhwbgpm,
       wxhtsheet.ywsm,
       wxhtsheet.hhcb,
       wxhtsheet.djpm,
       wxhtsheet.djpmy,
       wxhtsheet.djpmw,
       wxhtsheet.krCODE,
       wxhtsheet.bgjldw,
       wxhtsheet.hhbz,
       wxhtsheet.krtm,
       wxhtsheet.hgbm,
       wxhtsheet.rkdd,
       wxhtsheet.wxbm1,
       wxhtsheet.zsbh,
       wxhtsheet.zycpbh,
       wxhtsheet.dkds,
       wxhtsheet.krddh,
       wxhtsheet.sfsq,
       wxhtsheet.gcpp,
       wxhtsheet.wxwyzd
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet 
WHERE (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.pid) 
  AND (wxht.wxsh<>"123") 
  AND (wxht.jdrq<>"1999-01-01") 
  AND (wxht.order_id=[出运计划.合同号码]) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.bjhh="") 
  OR (wxhtsheet.bjhh is null)) 
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.sid ASC

SELECT fysqsheet.sid,
       fysqsheet.hklx,
       fysqsheet.seje,
       fysq.hbdm,
       fysq.ywbm,
       fysq.csmc,
       fysq.bz1,

  AND (fysqsheet.khmc=[出运计划.客户名称]))) 
  AND (ifnull(fysqsheet.wxfp,"")<>"")
